facebook-scrape.summary: Scraped Facebook (3:21 PM ET Mar 31). 12 unread notifications: welcome-post mentions in Cleaners Connect (2:56 PM ET) and HVAC Business Owners (9:04 AM ET), plus group activity in Junk Removal Owners, friend confirms, and tagged-in-photo events across 6 industry groups — no new direct engagement on Novaro AI outreach posts. Activity log confirms 5 posts live from March 30 (Junk Removal Winners, USA Car Detailing, Pressure Washing Business Owners, Pro Window Cleaning, Window Cleaning Newbies). Messenger shows no new unread DMs. Groups active updated 16→18 based on expanded group activity log (Commercial Cleaning, PLUMBERS TALK, Roofing Contractors, HVAC, Painting, etc.). Cumulative totals unchanged: 113 comments, 38 positive, 2 DMs, 12 interest signals, 18 posts live.

linkedin-scrape.summary: Scraped LinkedIn (3:37 PM ET Mar 31): 1,040 total connections. 181 pending sent requests — most recent visible batch (Jim Black, David Sconza, Justin Walsh, Patrick Winterstein, Aidan Westphalen, Gavin Bilby, Karter Howard, Eli Nash, Jackson Manning, Rex Owen) sent ~6 hours ago (~9:37 AM ET). Connection accepted this cycle: Stefano Cardillo (Owner/Lawn Care Specialist at SC Landscaping). Messaging inbox shows 7 unread items — no new prospect replies or positive buying intent; 1 inbound outreach from Vincent Handugan (VA pitch, Mar 20, not a lead). 0 interest signals. Metrics unchanged from prior run; lastUpdated timestamp refreshed.
